home.title: Welcome — Buguya nuani.
home.subtitle: A community-owned Garifuna learning platform built with the Garifuna Commission on Education and the Ibagari Foundation.

cultural_protocol.title: Labayayahoun Ibagari — the Foundation's Guardianship
cultural_protocol.principle: The Garifuna language is held under Labayayahoun Ibagari — the Foundation's guardianship. Data is not owned but cared for. Any benefit derived flows back to the Garifuna people, through the Garifuna Commission on Education and the Ibagari Foundation. Use is gifted with agüriahati — the kinship-act of nurturing the language into the next generation.
